hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"PUSH CHECK (mandatory): A git push just ran. Before you say ANYTHING to the user: (1) Use the GitHub MCP tools to check whether the PR previously associated with this branch is already MERGED or CLOSED. (2) If it is merged/closed, the commits you just pushed did NOT attach to it — open a NEW pull request for them now. (3) Always report the correct OPEN PR number/URL to the user; never cite a merged/closed PR as the destination of a fresh push."}}'
